---
title: "SoundTrap File Wrangling"
author: "Molly Wilson"
date: "2026-05-27"
output: html_document
---

```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(stringr)
library(lubridate)

# set file name
files <- readLines(here("acoustic_monitoring", "data_raw", "filelist_2026_02.txt"))

# set sampling interval (rounded to nearest 10 min)
start <- as.POSIXct("2026-02-07 06:00:00", tz = "ACT")
stop <- as.POSIXct("2026-05-08 15:50:00", tz = "ACT")

df <- data.frame(file = files) %>%
  mutate(ts_raw = str_extract(file, "(?<=\\.)\\d{12}(?=\\.)"),
    datetime = as.POSIXct(ts_raw, format = "%y%m%d%H%M%S", tz = "UTC"),
    datetime_10 = floor_date(datetime, "10 minutes"))

observed <- df %>%
  distinct(datetime_10) %>%
  filter(!is.na(datetime_10))

expected <- data.frame(
  datetime_10 = seq(
    from = start,
    to   = stop,
    by   = "10 min"))

missing <- anti_join(expected, observed, by = "datetime_10")

missing_periods <- missing %>%
  arrange(datetime_10) %>%
  mutate(
    gap_group = cumsum(c(1, diff(datetime_10) != minutes(10)))
  ) %>%
  group_by(gap_group) %>%
  summarise(
    start = min(datetime_10),
    end   = max(datetime_10),
    n_missing = n(),
    .groups = "drop"
  )
```
